selectionBasis: The source-pinned M1 matrix selected four evidence lanes that discriminate among competing causes; this batch preserves those lanes without treating coordinate counts as completion targets.

records.title: Transition, active-state, continuation, and honest phase exit
records.demand: Determine whether current capabilities preserve fresh, authority-bounded active state and support honest no-delta or phase-exit outcomes across interruption and re-entry.
uncertainty: The bound evidence does not establish a carrier-neutral state contract or conversational continuation semantics.
Host, model, reasoning, loader, permission, workspace, freshness, privacy, and loop-termination behavior remain condition-specific.
heldClaims: No portable transition or handoff standard is accepted.
No existing Skill, runtime primitive, or composed path is yet proven sufficient for this demand.
recheckTriggers: a continuation carrier, state schema, host, model, loader, or permission boundary changes
a concrete transition failure or competing remediation hypothesis is bound
a residual-gap or carrier recommendation is proposed

records.title: Capability routing, activation portability, fallback, and control cost
records.demand: Determine the minimum sufficient native-first route across implicit, explicit, no-loader, and fallback conditions while measuring observability, collision, latency, context, false-positive, permission, and maintenance costs.
uncertainty: Documented host support does not prove live availability, implicit activation, body compliance, collision behavior, or cross-host parity.
The host-profile and graceful-degradation recommendation remains a project hypothesis pending paired behavior and cost evidence.
heldClaims: No universal router, activation contract, host adapter, or Hook policy is accepted.
Hook suitability remains downstream of a supported residual gap and a bound host-specific use case; the default is no Hook.
recheckTriggers: product documentation, model, discovery root, activation, synchronization, permission, or carrier behavior changes
paired cross-host or with/without-control evidence becomes available
a Hook, adapter, root consolidation, or universal portability claim is proposed

records.title: Evidence sufficiency and accountable human or domain review
records.demand: Classify which bounded claims can close from deterministic or source evidence and which require competent, independent, accessible, veto-capable, accountable human or domain review.
uncertainty: Human presence, explanation, confidence, or terse approval does not prove competent or effective review.
Legal, professional, safety, privacy, security, medical, financial, production, and organizational applicability require their own accountable authority.
heldClaims: No general Skill can replace domain evidence, affected-subject judgment, or accountable professional authority.
No universal risk-to-proof ladder, review threshold, or cannot-close policy is accepted.
recheckTriggers: a consequential claim, jurisdiction, domain, affected subject, or acceptance authority is bound
new evidence changes review effectiveness, cognitive cost, or applicability
a cross-agent evidence or human-oversight standard is proposed

records.title: Projection, lifecycle, public-private, and cross-repository governance
records.demand: Trace source, projection, discovery, execution, and verification edges with explicit owner, authority, freshness, compatibility, privacy, license, rollback, and public-private boundaries.
uncertainty: External lifecycle standards and practices do not establish local adoption, repository authority, projection direction, or runtime compatibility.
Current repository metadata cannot prove every consumer discovery or execution path.
heldClaims: No cross-repository standard, sync change, public projection, live-root mutation, or repository-role mutation is authorized.
This repository is not the standards authority or live consumer configuration owner.
recheckTriggers: a source, destination, owner, version, license, privacy, consumer, or projection edge changes
official documentation and local metadata cannot resolve a compatibility or discovery question
a cross-repository write, public projection, standard candidate, or consumer admission claim is proposed

batchDecision.nextGate: bounded public metadata discovery for EL-01, EL-02, and EL-04; EL-03 remains on the human/domain-authority path

verificationSurface: exactly four source-selected evidence lanes are represented once
every record binds non-empty SG, P, and STM coordinates to the pinned sources
every record preserves evidence claims, evidence state, uncertainty, held claims, affected subjects, and recheck triggers
every record remains not-assessed for residual gap; only EL-01, EL-02, and EL-04 are eligible for bounded public metadata discovery
the batch does not copy source bodies or authorize candidate execution, Skill or Hook creation, standards promotion, runtime mutation, cross-repository writes, or remote push
